queries.name: invalid_syntax
queries.errorMessage:
Syntax error at line 1, column 0: extraneous input 'THIS' expecting {ALTER, ATTACH, BEGIN, CALL, CHECKPOINT, COMMENT, COMMIT, COPY, CREATE, DELETE, DETACH, DROP, EXPLAIN, EXPORT, FORCE, IMPORT, INSTALL, LOAD, MATCH, MERGE, OPTIONAL, PROFILE, RETURN, ROLLBACK, SET, UNWIND, UNINSTALL, UPDATE, USE, WITH, SP}
Syntax error at line 1, column 5: mismatched input 'IS' expecting {ALTER, ATTACH, BEGIN, CALL, CHECKPOINT, COMMENT, COMMIT, COPY, CREATE, DELETE, DETACH, DROP, EXPORT, FORCE, IMPORT, INSTALL, LOAD, MATCH, MERGE, OPTIONAL, RETURN, ROLLBACK, SET, UNWIND, UNINSTALL, UPDATE, USE, WITH}

queries.name: non_constant_skip
queries.errorMessage: The expression in a SKIP clause must evaluate to a constant or a parameter.

queries.name: non_constant_limit
queries.errorMessage: The expression in a LIMIT clause must evaluate to a constant or a parameter.

queries.name: distinct_order_by_not_projected
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person) RETURN DISTINCT p.name ORDER BY p.id
queries.errorMessage: In a WITH/RETURN with DISTINCT, all expressions in ORDER BY must appear in the projection.

queries.name: compare_string_to_int
queries.errorMessage: Cannot compare differing types: STRING and INT64
